description: In ESA SNAP Desktop, create a publication-ready cartographic figure from the Landsat multispectral image at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. Configure a false-color composite using Red = band_1 (SWIR1), Green = band_2 (NIR), and Blue = band_3 (Red). The figure must include a scale bar and a north arrow. Export the rendered map as a PNG to /home/ga/snap_exports/landsat_figure.png.
